attributes.name: "search_wikipedia"
attributes.mlflow.spanOutputs: ["Small Faces | Small Faces were an English rock band from East London. The group was founded in 1965 by members Steve Marriott, Ronnie Lane, Kenney Jones, and Jimmy Winston, although by 1966 Winston was replaced by Ian McLagan as the band's keyboardist.", "Majik Mijits | The Legendary Majik Mijits is an album that was recorded by Steve Marriott and Ronnie Lane when they reformed under the name of \"Majik Mijits\" in 1981 and gave a one-off concert at the Bridgehouse pub in East London.
